summary: Frontend-only validation completed on local static preview (http://127.0.0.1:3456). Core redesigned flows render and navigation works; several code-review and runtime issues were identified.

integration_issues.issue: Browser console repeatedly logs `Failed to load resource: net::ERR_INVALID_URL` for embedded `data:image/jpeg;base64,...` assets during screen render.

design_issues.screen: Top bar (all screens with back button)
issues: Back button touch target is 42x42, below recommended 44x44 minimum touch target for mobile accessibility.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: `useNativeDriver` not supported in web fallback; animations run JS-driven in preview.

action_items: Investigate malformed/unsupported data URI image loading path causing `ERR_INVALID_URL` console errors.
Increase back button to at least 44x44 touch target.
Align frontend backend env usage with platform convention (code uses `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL`; project guidelines require `EXPO_BACKEND_URL`).
Add missing `testID` to fallback navigation pressables on not-found states for stronger automation coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: `/app/frontend/services/api.ts` uses `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL` and `extra.backendUrl`; this diverges from the required `EXPO_BACKEND_URL` convention in project rules.
Fallback `Pressable` actions in `VendorDetailScreen` and `BookingScreen` not-found states do not include `testID`.
Large base64 image constants in `/app/frontend/mock/images/*.ts` correlate with runtime URL errors in browser console; likely asset format/encoding issue in web preview path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth not tested (frontend-only request). `/app/memory/test_credentials.md` exists but contains no credentials. Core path verified: Home -> Vendor Detail -> Booking. Theme toggle cycle verified AUTO -> DARK -> LIGHT -> AUTO.
rca_of_issue: Reproduction for console error: open home screen in web preview and observe browser console logs while vendor cards render. Observed repeated `ERR_INVALID_URL` entries referencing very long `data:image/jpeg;base64,...` strings from mock image sources. Mitigation direction: validate base64 payload integrity/length and replace with static file assets or vetted URLs for web preview reliability. NOTE: booking webhooks are MOCKED (`n8n availability webhook`, `n8n booking submission webhook`).
